title: Binding Assurance Standard
description: New Zealand government standard that defines controls for binding entities to their entity information to prevent identity theft and account takeover. Establishes binding assurance levels (1-4) with corresponding factor requirements and ongoing integrity maintenance controls.

source.page_title: Binding Assurance Standard | NZ Digital government
